phase.en: EarthLivingCore 0.9.3 is live with the VS3.5 TAB Slice: PlaceholderAPI placeholders expose current country, border access, required visa, passport status, Discord verification status and current server for TAB.
phase.da: EarthLivingCore 0.9.3 er live med VS3.5 TAB Slice: PlaceholderAPI-placeholders viser current country, border access, required visa, passport status, Discord verification status og current server til TAB.
